note: Derived read metrics to compute per coin, so figures reconcile across the pack.
drawdown_from_ath_pct: how far below the all-time high the price sits, = -(ath_change_percentage). Larger means deeper drawdown / more recovery room.
liquidity_ratio: total_volume / market_cap. Higher means more 24h turnover relative to size (more liquid / more speculative churn).
supply_issued_pct: circulating_supply / max_supply * 100, only where a max supply exists. Higher means less future dilution.
